channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish left to pollute waterways, 10th March
item.description:
Rubbish not cleared up. Reported previously but issue not resolved. Littering a constant issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Statham Grove, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Underground carpark flooding, 10th March
item.description:
The car park under the flats on Spenser Grove has been flooding for weeks. The smell is awful. Warm weather has produced a huge amount of tiny flies and a smell that resembles sewage. The busted sewage pipe needs to be fixed and the garage fumigated.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Approach Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 10th March
item.description:
This issue has been going on for decades as Lemmon Road is a short cut to Greenwich Park for dog owners. Bags of faeces are regularly dropped randomly along the back and front pavements leading to Maze Hill. There are no notices asking dog owners to dispose of their bags thoughtfully and not to allow their dogs to foul the pavements. Please could this be remedied as dogs are even being let to foul where the children's play area is.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lemmon Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded flower pots and plants, 10th March
item.description:
These have been here for two weeks and we're dumped there by workmen who were working at no 37 Spenser Grove N16 8UA

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Approach Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal & plastic embedded in tarmac, 10th March
item.description:
Plastic and metal (steel wire) is embedded in the St Katherines Road carriageway following a van fire several months ago and causes a hazard to vehicles and vehicle tyres when driven over. Drivers will swerve across the carriageway to drive on the wrong side to avoid it, irrespective of oncoming traffic. A similar problem exists from an earlier vehicle fire in the parking bay in the corner approximately 100 yards to the north - although this one only affects anyone parking in the corner bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, St Katherines Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Various articles: kitchen bins, trellis and cabinets etc left at the side of garage no 25

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Smith Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown weeds and debris, 10th March
item.description:
Clearing the overgrown weeds coming from Maze Hill Railway land along Lemmon Road was started and a pile left on one of the few parking spots for over 4 weeks. Since then no sign of the rest of the overgrowth being removed which is taking over the road surface.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Smith Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate language daubed on to bus stop timetable, 10th March
item.description:
Inappropriate language daubed on to bus stop timetable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 289, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Large amount of dumped household items - a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spray Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes & other matter dumped in Kent Road, 10th March
item.description:
These boxes are dumped alongside house number 25 Kent Road near the Swan public house thx
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Large cardboard box in carriageway possibly full of builder debris
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hadlow Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waterfall is still blocked, 10th March
item.description:
The waterfall between the main lake and lower lake is still blocked. The blockage is stopping the water flow at the top of the waterfall and at the bottom of the fall. It has been like this for 2 months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Downs Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 10th March
item.description:
Light on during on for part of the day and off at night. This has been reported in January and claims to be fixed, but it's not.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appledore Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive industrial fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
This is outrageous! The problem is on this street again! But now massive amount of industrial rubbish has been thrown! Why there are no signs around? Nobody cares about our street!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anglesea Avenue, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 10th March
item.description:
Dead fox
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These bins are filthy, never cleaned, one is covered with grafffiti. They smell foul and need a thorough clean or better still they should be replaced., 10th March
item.description:
They are at the entrance to Dulwich Park by the Court Lane gates and are very off putting when you arrive at the park. They are emptied regularly but the actual bins are in a very bad state and have been for many months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carriage Drive, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed vehicle., 10th March
item.description:
The vehicle is situated on the service road adjacent to the Fair Acres estate, just near Amrita Hall. It is untaxed and has no MOT. It has been here for a few weeks now. Taking up a valuable parking space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Fair Acres, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded zigzag road markings, 10th March
item.description:
Zig zags outside school gates very faded. Drivers already don’t heed them. There’s an urgent need to repaint these road markings to reinforce safe driving and ensure safety of children attending school.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highcombe, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on elcot avenue, 10th March
item.description:
Lots of items dumped outside the tire fitters on elcot avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall - willowbrook road, 10th March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willowbrook Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
